notes: Iteration 11 revised plan. Phase 0 (data integrity) and Phase 1.1 (patching spot-check) COMPLETED. Remaining tasks: Phase 1.2, 1.3, Phase 2, Phase 2.7, Phase 3 (optional).

pilots.description: COMPLETED. data_manifest.json created with 53 claim mappings. 51/53 PASS.
COMPLETED. Per-token canonical chosen. 21.6% vs 27.1% discrepancy explained.
COMPLETED. Contributions reordered. 6/6 CI inversions fixed. 4.1x replaced with 2.7x.
COMPLETED. 20 city-continent entities. Mean recovery 62.7% (expected 61.9%). d=2.04, p<0.001. VERIFIED.

Run on all available city-country absorbed pairs (expected ~50-100 entities given 45.1% absorption rate on ~200 cities). If fewer than 20 absorbed pairs found at L24, fall back to documented exclusion.
pilots.pass_criteria: Patching completes. d and p-value reported with probe quality caveat (F1=0.73).
pilots.fail_action: Write documented exclusion paragraph for Section 5.2: 'City-country excluded due to probe quality (F1=0.73) below relaxed gate.'

pilots.description: Run first-letter patching at L24 using all available absorbed letter-pairs (expected 25-26 letters). Task is inherently small.
pilots.pass_criteria: Patching completes at L24. Qualitatively consistent with L12 (positive recovery, d > 0.5). Figure 4 regenerated.
pilots.fail_action: If L24 first-letter absorption is too low (<5%) to detect meaningful patching effect, document the layer-dependent absorption finding and keep L12 panel with explicit caption note.

pilots.description: Paper revision incorporating all Phase 0-1 results. (2.1) Reframe probe degradation. (2.2) Eliminate Section 7.2 repetition. (2.3) Fix figures 5, 6. (2.4) Reduce abstract density. (2.5) Minor fixes. (2.6) Update proposal numbers.
pilots.pass_criteria: validate_integration.py passes. All writing issues from iter_010 review addressed.
validate_integration.py exits 0. 5 spot-checked claims trace to source correctly.

pilots.description: Pilot: degrade city-continent probe to ONE F1 level (0.85), measure absorption on 100 tokens. Verify: (a) noise injection successfully degrades multi-class probe, (b) absorption rate increases relative to undegraded probe, (c) pipeline runs without error.
pilots.pass_criteria: Degraded probe F1 within 0.05 of target 0.85. Absorption rate > undegraded rate. Pipeline completes in < 15 min.
pilots.fail_action: If noise injection does not meaningfully degrade multi-class probe (F1 stays > 0.95), try alternative degradation: random weight perturbation or feature dropout.

pilots.description: Pilot: compute three-factor features (cos_sim, co-occurrence, reconstruction importance) for 100 parent-child pairs from first-letter hierarchy only. Fit model. Verify: (a) features are computable, (b) model fits without numerical issues, (c) Spearman rho is not NaN.
pilots.pass_criteria: Three features computed for >= 80 pairs. Model fits. Spearman rho is finite. If rho > 0.3 on first-letter alone: proceed to full cross-hierarchy validation.
pilots.fail_action: If rho < 0.1 on first-letter pilot: document as negative result consistent with H5 failure. Do not proceed to full validation.

execution_order.description: PARALLEL: two remaining verification experiments (each uses 1 GPU, can run in parallel if 2 GPUs available, or sequentially on 1 GPU)
execution_order.note: These 2 tasks are independent. With max_gpus>=2, both can run in parallel.

execution_order.description: Comprehensive writing revision incorporating all Phase 0-1 results
OPTIONAL PARALLEL: strengthening experiments (only if time permits after quality gate)
execution_order.note: Both are optional. Skip if iteration time budget exhausted.

total_estimated_minutes.note: Phase 1 tasks can run in parallel (30+40 min -> ~40 min wall-clock with 2 GPUs). Phase 3 optional. Phase 0 and Phase 1.1 already completed (~3.5 hours saved).
